title: GrimCrosshairIndicator
description: GrimCrosshairIndicator is a lightweight and highly customizable PvP HUD mod that enhances your crosshair with useful combat indicators in real time.
body:
GrimCrosshairIndicator is a lightweight and highly customizable PvP HUD mod that enhances your crosshair with useful combat indicators in real time.

The mod changes your crosshair color when an enemy is within hit range and displays a shield indicator whenever a player is blocking with a shield, helping you react faster during combat.

Perfect for competitive PvP players who want cleaner and more informative combat feedback.
Discord Support server https://discord.gg/UE8nwGbYwt
